# Convenient Service

> ConvenientService is a Ruby gem that provides a service object pattern with middleware-like feature composition.

## Docs

- [Test](https://userdocs.convenientservice.org/docs/test.md)
- [Basics](https://userdocs.convenientservice.org/docs/basics.md)
- [Benefits and Drawbacks](https://userdocs.convenientservice.org/docs/benefits-and-drawbacks.md)
